tagline: Weekly pool care with chemistry that behaves.

hero.title: BlueLane pool cleaning hero image
hero.alt: A pool care technician skimming a bright blue backyard pool beside an open water testing kit on a sunny patio.

contact.serviceArea: Weekly pool cleaning, water testing, skimming, basket checks, brush work, filter attention, green-to-clean help, vacation checks, and opening support for backyard pools across the west metro and lakeside suburbs

copy.eyebrow: Weekly pool care with a clean test board
copy.heroText: BlueLane keeps the skim, brush, baskets, and chemistry on a simple route so the pool is ready before anyone asks if it is safe to jump in.
copy.introTitle: A weekly route with visible chemistry notes.
copy.introText: We balance the basics, watch the equipment clues, note weather swings, and send plain-language service updates after each visit.
copy.quoteTitle: Want the pool off your mental checklist?
copy.quoteText: Start service with pool size, gate details, equipment photos, and the current water mood. We will reply with a route-day option, first-visit notes, and a simple weekly plan.

services.title: Weekly Clear Care
services.text: Skim, brush, basket check, surface scan, water test, balance notes, and a quick equipment look for pools that need steady predictable care.

services.title: Green-To-Clean Reset
services.text: A practical recovery plan for cloudy or green water, with extra brushing, chemistry guidance, filter attention, and progress notes after each visit.

services.title: Vacation Watch
services.text: Short-term pool check-ins while you are away, including baskets, water level notes, storm debris cleanup, and a photo update before you come home.

process.title: Send the setup
process.text: Photos of the pool, gate, pump area, filter label, and current water color help us plan the first visit without making you decode equipment names.

process.title: Test and tune
process.text: On route day we skim, brush, check baskets, test water, note the weather pattern, and make small balance moves before they become weekend problems.

process.title: Read the update
process.text: You get a plain note with what changed, what looked good, what needs watching, and when the next service window is scheduled.

serviceDetails.turnaround: 7 day: weekly route rhythm for steady water.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send your address or neighborhood, access notes, preferred cadence, photos when useful, and any skip conditions before joining the route.

serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Route-fit flow for Weekly pool cleaning, water testing, skimming, basket checks, brush work, filter attention, green-to-clean help, vacation checks, and opening support for backyard pools across the west metro and lakeside suburbs: cadence, access, skip rules, and first-visit notes make the route realistic.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For pool cleaning service, gate access, water condition, equipment photos, route cadence, and storm/debris notes are checked before weekly service starts.
